kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/setup/admin path_url=/api/v1/setup/admin headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '80', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Admin User", "email": "admin_97483@email.com", "password": "admin123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/auth/login path_url=/api/v1/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '58', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin_97483@email.com", "password": "admin123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${movie} = {'title': 'Filme Teste', 'synopsis': 'Um filme de teste automatizado', 'director': 'Diretor Teste', 'genres': ['Drama'], 'duration': '120', 'classification': '16', 'poster': 'teste.jpg', 'releaseDate'...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/movies path_url=/api/v1/movies headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5ZDZkOGRhZGRjYjU5N2I0YmI3YTE4ZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTY4Nzg5OSwiZXhwIjoxNzc1Nzc0Mjk5fQ.EztzCGhC19-YPYuFuUlH83NxXorZrEeibUy1KTXv5lc', 'Content-Length': '215', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"title": "Filme Teste", "synopsis": "Um filme de teste automatizado", "director": "Diretor Teste", "genres": ["Drama"], "duration": "120", "classification": "16", "poster": "teste.jpg", "releaseDate": "2026-04-08"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${movie_json} = {'success': True, 'data': {'title': 'Filme Teste', 'synopsis': 'Um filme de teste automatizado', 'director': 'Diretor Teste', 'genres': ['Drama'], 'duration': 120, 'classification': '16', 'poster': 't...
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/movies path_url=/api/v1/movies headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5ZDZkOGRiZGRjYjU5N2I0YmI3YTE5NSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTY4Nzg5OSwiZXhwIjoxNzc1Nzc0Mjk5fQ.JwKjh5Ms07o_N4QDF33iZ8_dAzWE3GyikNGWleMtsLw'} body=None

kw.name: Log

do Amanhã","synopsis":"Em um futuro próximo, uma cientista descobre uma forma de prever eventos catastróficos, mas precisa enfrentar decisões difíceis para salvar a humanidade.","director":"Carla Mendes","genres":["Ficção Científica","Drama"],"duration":0,"classification":"14 kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${movies_json} = {'success': True, 'count': 10, 'pagination': {'next': {'page': 2, 'limit': 10}}, 'data': [{'_id': '69d6d8dbddcb597b4bb7a192', 'title': 'Filme Teste', 'synopsis': 'Um filme de teste automatizado', 'dir...

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
